```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Autocorrelation function of the `AirPassengers` data set.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Data
data <- datasets::AirPassengers |>
  acf(plot = FALSE, lag.max = 144) |>
  with(expr = data.frame(lag, acf))

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data = data, aes(x = lag, y = acf)) +
  ggplot2::geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "identity") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::xlab(label = "Lag") +
  ggplot2::ylab(label = "Autocorrelation")
```
